name: Lekki-Epe Expressway Underpass
notes: Low-lying underpass with history of severe flooding during heavy rain. Drainage system frequently overwhelmed. Multiple vehicle strandings recorded.

name: Admiralty Way, Lekki Phase 1
notes: Moderate flood risk during sustained rainfall. Street-level flooding common but rarely exceeds ankle depth. Drainage partially functional.

name: Lekki Phase 1 Roundabout
notes: Intersection prone to waterlogging during peak rain. Water pools at center of roundabout.

name: Jakande Junction, Lekki
notes: High traffic junction with poor drainage. Flooding frequently causes multi-hour traffic gridlock. Road surface damaged by repeated flooding.

name: Victoria Island Marina
notes: Extremely low elevation, vulnerable to both rainfall flooding and tidal surges. Critical infrastructure area.

name: Ikoyi Link Bridge Road
notes: Elevated road with good drainage. Rarely floods except during extreme events.
